titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Musadif
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Musadif

segments: ه عن مصادف فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رحمه اللّه- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن عليّ بن رئاب، عن مصادف‌.
arabic.text: ه عن مصادف فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رحمه اللّه- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن عليّ بن رئاب، عن مصادف‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Musadif has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub, from Ali ibn Ri'ab, from Musadif.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Musadif has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub, from Ali ibn Ri'ab, from Musadif.
